title: Horizon's Outlined Ores
description: Never miss out on diamonds again because of  hard to see ores!
body:
Horizon's Outlined Ores resource pack is designed to provide a clear and easily recognizable outline around all ore blocks in Minecraft. The outlines are distinct and bold, making it simple for players to spot ores while mining in dimly lit caves or underground tunnels. This pack is perfect for players who want to improve their ore gathering efficiency and prevent valuable resources from going unnoticed.

With Horizon's Outlined Ores, players can say goodbye to straining their eyes or missing out on hidden ores. The pack makes it easier to identify and extract ores quickly and effectively, saving time and resources in the process. Whether you're a seasoned miner or new to the game, this resource pack is a valuable addition to your Minecraft experience. Download Ducky's Outlined Ores today and make your mining adventures more rewarding and enjoyable.

FAQ: [planetminecraft/blog/minecraft-java-edition-texture-pack-faq](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/minecraft-java-edition-texture-pack-faq/)
